description_long: This is a long, black luxury limousine with a sleek, elongated body and a distinct, formal appearance. The vehicle features a glossy black finish with silver or chrome accents on the wheels, door handles, and grille. The limousine has four visible doors, with extended rear passenger compartments and tinted windows for privacy. The roofline is slightly raised in the middle, suggesting additional headroom for rear passengers. The front end is characterized by a prominent chrome grille and rectangular headlights, while the rear has large taillights and a spacious trunk. The overall design is elegant and imposing, suitable for high-profile urban transportation.
description: A glossy black, elongated luxury limousine with chrome accents, tinted windows, and a raised roofline for rear passenger comfort.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, four doors, tinted windows, and chrome wheels.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the wide trunk, large taillights, and rear window.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the length and door configuration of the first side.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the prominent chrome grille, rectangular headlights, and sleek hood.
